allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 7588 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle, Path")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name app -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name app -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'still running' } else { 'stopped' }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name app -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output 'done'")
